title_synonyms: Magic Repo Man: Dumped by My Party
I'll Cash In With a Cute Support Fairy to Become the Strongest!
Lent Magic Point Is Forcibly Collected by Revolving Payment
Unlimited Vault: The Magic They Borrowed Will Be Their Downfall
data.synopsis:
Lent is part of the up-and-coming party known as the "Skypiercers," and thanks to his unique Gift, he can loan massive amounts of magic to others. No MP? No problem with Lent around! Except, now that his companions have become formidable heroes (thanks to his skill), his usefulness is questioned. Kicked out of the group, Lent is furious...until he discovers a hidden power to his Gift. Now, with his adorably devious fairy partner, he's going to claw back every last scrap of magic from his former party—with interest!

(Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

data.title: Fangkai Nage Nuwu
data.synopsis:
Modern man Cheng Yan unexpectedly dies and his soul travels to a medieval European-style otherworldly continent, becoming Roland, the fourth prince of the Kingdom of Graycastle. This playboy prince saves the witch Anna at an execution scene and is shocked to discover that magic really exists in this medieval-style otherworld.

When Anna, as a witch, displays her magical skills, Roland realizes that magic can replace some modern technology, so he formulates a "great development of magical industry" plan. Thus, in an era where everyone hates witches, the independent Roland begins to recruit witches, using their magic to transform Border Town and improve the lives of himself and the locals.

In addition to using magic to develop industry, Roland also introduces modern business ideas to Border Town. Under Roland's leadership, people manufacture firearms, and Roland gains public support. As the number of witches in Roland's camp increases, the magical industry continues to improve. At the same time, Roland will face battles with great families and other princes and princesses.

As his territory expands, Roland successfully creates a harmonious coexistence between witches and ordinary people, gradually bringing the western territory of Graycastle and even the entire kingdom under his rule, and slowly uncovering the secrets of the devil race and the Witch Empire.

(Source: Crunchyroll)
data.background: Adaptation of Er Mu's (二目) web novel of the same title.

data.title: Death Stranding: Isolation
data.synopsis:
Once, there was an explosion...

Lonesome souls of the dead manifest in the physical world, reaching in search of the living. However, the connection they create triggers a massive explosion that eradicates anything of this world—a phenomenon referred to as the Death Stranding. These events wipe out nations as well as civilization itself. People who remain are now isolated, withdrawn, and without connections. As humanity stands at the brink, a legendary porter sets out to transport both cargo and wishes of its senders, reconnecting people in the hope that they might still be saved.

Somewhere in North America, just as Sam Bridges walks through the continent in order to save America, the others are also trying to deal with their isolation in their own way. An old man trying to realize salvation through ways outside of the connection advocated by Bridges. A female warrior who tries to kickstart a world of constant fighting. A boy with a grudge against Bridges. A girl who embraces loneliness.

On the precipice of the end of humanity and the world, their fates and hopes converge, as another story of Death Stranding begins.

And now, comes another explosion... 

(Source: Kojima Productions, edited)

data.title: Kyoukai no Melody
data.synopsis:
After losing his musical partner Kai in an accident just before their major debut, Kyousuke has distanced himself from music and lives without motivation. Three years later, Kai suddenly appears before Kyousuke, unchanged and as outspoken as ever.

"Being alive but doing nothing... that's no different from being dead."

Encouraged by Kai's words, Kyousuke returns to the world of music, rediscovering the joy of creating sound together. But their time together cannot last forever...

(Source: MAL News)

data.title: Toumei na Yoru ni Kakeru Kimi to, Me ni Mienai Koi wo Shita.
data.title_english: Love Unseen Beneath the Clear Night Sky
data.title_japanese: 透明な夜に駆ける君と、目に見えない恋をした。
title_synonyms: Toumei na Yoru ni Kakeru Kimi to
Me ni Mienai Koi wo Shita.
Gokusai no Yoru ni Kakeru-kun to
data.synopsis:
On an April night in Tokyo, still too early for fireworks, university student Kakeru Mano meets a woman named Koharu Fuyutsuki. She is a beautiful girl who stands out from the crowd, laughs a lot, and exudes a warmth that contrasts sharply with Kakeru's own introversion. But there was something Kakeru didn't know at first—she can't see. Unlike Kakeru, Koharu hasn't given up on anything, even with her blindness. She attends university daily, shows interest in clubs, makes friends—and dreams of launching fireworks one day. Kakeru wonders why, when she can't see them...but maybe it doesn't matter. And maybe he can start moving forward, too, for the girl who's always been by his side.

(Source: Yen Press)

data.title: Loca!
data.synopsis:
Two inquisitive kids, Tamo and Haru, might be the last people on Earth. They explore the silent, overgrown ruins of what was once rural Japan, documenting their discoveries in a notebook. When they come across a disused commuter train, and find out that it's operational, who knows where it will take them? A disconcertingly cheerful and childish interpretation of the end of the world.

(Source: fantasiafestival.com)

data.title: On Being
data.synopsis: Music video for the song On Being by Max Cooper and Félix Gerbelot.

data.title: Di Yi Xulie 2
data.synopsis:
Nuclear winter has arrived, civilization has collapsed, and humanity is no longer the master of the world. Species mutations and scarce resources create an unpredictable future and environment, leading to a series of crises. To protect themselves, humanity has built walls, but outside these walls, survival depends on blood and fire. 

The protagonist, Ren Xiaosu, and his younger brother, Yan Liuyuan, are among them. They were just ordinary teenagers in the wilderness, without shelter or a way out; their only support was each other. But fate granted them the power to awaken in their dire circumstances. The Jingshan earthquake caused the collapse of Wall 113, fully shattering the post-apocalyptic chaos. During their escape, Ren Xiaosu and his family rescue Luo Lan, the military leader, and enter Wall 109. A new life is about to begin, but the real test has only just begun…

(Source: Bilibili, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Huishuohua de Zhouzi's (会说话的肘子) web novel of the same title.

data.title: Huo Feng Liao Yuan San
data.synopsis:
In 193 AD, Guo Jia presented the dark military strategy of "slaughtering one city to subdue ten," leading Cao Cao to attack Xuzhou under the pretext of "avenging his father." Historical records state that "hundreds of thousands of men and women were killed." Liaoyuan Huo, posing as Zhao Yun, aided the people of Xuzhou in their desperate defense, outwitting and outmaneuvering Cao Cao's army, while secretly recruiting Liu Bei to join the fight against Cao Cao. Lu Bu, lying in wait in Chenliu, launched a surprise attack on Cao Cao's rear, following the advice of his strategist Chen Gong. Zhuge Liang and Sima Yi also arrived in Xuzhou, stirring up the war. The Battle of Xuzhou saw Lu Bu, Xu Chu, Dian Wei, Zhao Yun, and other powerful figures engage in a fierce battle that shook the world. After this battle, the tables have turned in Xuzhou. Cao Cao then turns his attention to his powerful northern enemy, and a top-level strategic game that would determine the fate of the world begins.

(Source: Bilibili, translated)

data.title: Jiaonang Jihua: Qiji
data.synopsis:
"Capsules Project" is a collection of domestically produced animated short films created by a professional team with mature animation production experience. With the creative theme of "extreme emotion + independent theme," it does not restrict the creative form, exploring the possibilities of animation together with the team. The aim is to collaboratively create original short films with diverse styles and characteristics, and to help Chinese animators reach the world stage. "Miracle" represents transcending conventions and breaking through limitations to achieve extraordinary success, often accompanied by a sense of mystery that inspires awe and curiosity. What miracles will occur in these 10 stories?

(Source: Bilibili, translated)

data.title: Liangyao
data.synopsis:
It tells the story of a group of heroes in a fictional world where all medicines are forbidden. A wandering swordsman named Shao Xia, an amnesiac pharmacist named Wuming, a passionate constable named Susu, and a royal pharmacist named Xu Changqing form an alliance while searching for a mysterious monster. They gradually uncover the dark truth behind the city. The group must choose between trust and betrayal, power and consequences, attempting to save themselves and others in this unbalanced world.

(Source: Bilibili, translated)
